message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxPadding 20
  ArrowColor #000000
  MessageAlign left
}
hide footbox

actor Actor as A
participant EventBus as EB

box "Service Orchestrator" #7FC97F
  participant "SO" as SO
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #CFCF8A
  participant "storageresource" as SR
end box

A -> SO : Version Application Stack
SO -> SR : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EB <-- SO : data.list
SO -> SR : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EB <-- SO : data.list

@enduml
```
